title: Palmas、TO — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Palmas、TOの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

PalmasはTOにある人口313,349の都市です。A planned capital city in Brazil’s heartland, known for its modern design, environmental preservation areas, and the Ilha do Bananal wetlands.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
